title: Door Hanging Cat Toys Interactive for Indoor Cats Rechargeable Electronic Automatic Telescopic Self Play Mouse Toy with Remote Control Hunting Exercising
features: Interactive Door Hanging Toy: This unique electronic toy is designed to simulate engaging play between you and your cat. Simply hang it on any doorframe, turn it on, and it will instantly capture your cat's attention, encouraging them to chase and pounce for active exercise.

2 Stimulating Play Modes: Keep your cat endlessly curious with 2 distinct motion modes: 'Up and Down' and 'Rotate'. These varying patterns effectively maintain your cat's high interest, preventing boredom and providing diverse forms of mental and physical stimulation.

Smart Auto-Cycle & Shut-Off: Designed to prevent over-exertion and sustain engagement, the toy intelligently operates for 15 minutes, then automatically pauses for 5 minutes before resuming for another 15-minute session, after which it turns off. This smart cycle protects the motor and keeps the fun feeling fresh for your cat.

Adjustable & Tangle-Free Ropes: The set includes 2 durable elastic ropes in different lengths (1m and 2m) to suit various play spaces. A key feature is the easy retraction mechanism that allows the ropes to be neatly stored inside the toy. It also comes with 3 adorable plush mouse heads for added variety and replacement.

Wireless Remote & USB Rechargeable: Enjoy ultimate convenience with the included wireless remote to turn the toy on and off from a distance. The built-in battery is easily rechargeable via a USB cable, eliminating the cost and waste of disposable batteries for an eco-friendly and hassle-free experience.
